description: Decompose a song into functions (ie: verse, chorus, etc)
evaluation_criteria:
{"all_complete_correct":"The majority of the `play` blocks in the code are contained within functions rather than called directly under `when run`, and the workspace contains at least one higher-level function that calls several other helper functions within it. 

Example:
```
function beatBreakdown():
  play_together
    play "pack/drums_track_1"
    play "pack/bass_track_1"

function verse():
  play_together
    repeat 8
      play "pack/synth_track_1"
    play_sequential
      play "pack/vocal_verse_1"
      play "pack/vocal_verse_2"
      play "pack/vocal_verse_3"
      play "pack/vocal_verse_4"

function chorus():
  play_together
    repeat 8
      play "pack/drums_track_2"
    play_sequential
      play "pack/vocal_chorus_1"
      play "pack/vocal_chorus_2"
      play "pack/vocal_chorus_3"
      play "pack/vocal_chorus_4"

function fullSong():
  beatBreakdown()
  verse()
  beatBreakdown()
  chorus()

fullSong()
```","partial_complete_correct":"The workspace contains at least two functions and the majority of the `play` blocks in the code are contained within functions rather than called directly under `when run`

Example:
```
function beatBreakdown():
  play_together
    play "pack/drums_track_1"
    play "pack/bass_track_1"

function verse():
  play_together
    repeat 8
      play "pack/drums_track_2"
    play_sequential
      play "pack/vocal_verse_1"
      play "pack/vocal_verse_2"
      play "pack/vocal_verse_3"
      play "pack/vocal_verse_4"

function chorus():
  play_together
    repeat 8
      play "pack/drums_track_3"
    play_sequential
      play "pack/vocal_chorus_1"
      play "pack/vocal_chorus_2"
      play "pack/vocal_chorus_3"
      play "pack/vocal_chorus_4"

beatBreakdown()
verse()
beatBreakdown()
chorus()
```","incomplete_incorrect":"The workspace contains at least two functions that are called under the `when run` block, but the majority of the code is still under the `when run` block

Example:
```
function beatBreakdown():
  play_together
    play "pack/drums_track_1"
    play "pack/bass_track_1"

beatBreakdown()
play_together
  repeat 8
    play "pack/drums_track_2"
  play_sequential
    play "pack/vocal_verse_1"
    play "pack/vocal_verse_2"
    play "pack/vocal_verse_3"
    play "pack/vocal_verse_4"
beatBreakdown()
play_together
  repeat 8
    play "pack/drums_track_3"
  play_sequential
    play "pack/vocal_chorus_1"
    play "pack/vocal_chorus_2"
    play "pack/vocal_chorus_3"
    play "pack/vocal_chorus_4"
```}
